response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and systems engineering experience with a broad technical background, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI strategy expertise and 15+ years of experience, which the candidate partially meets (12+ years) and lacks explicit AI product leadership or advanced academic credentials in AI.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Seniority slightly below the 15-year requirement (12+ years)
No explicit AI strategy or product leadership experience at scale
Lacks advanced degree in AI-related field (preferred qualification)
